channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Funeral for Khamenei to begin July 4, burial set for July 9

- Pakistan, Saudi Arabia welcome final stage of U.S.-Iran talks]]>

item.title: UAE denies reports of it releasing frozen funds to Iran: Report
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- UAE denies reports of $3 billion transfer to Iran, calls claims "false and unfounded"]]>

item.title: Iranian foreign affairs minister says Strait of Hormuz will not return to pre-war status
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- No return to pre-war status for Strait of Hormuz – Iran’s top diplomat
- No return to pre-war status for Strait of Hormuz – Iran’s top diplomat]]>

item.title: Maritime body says tanker struck off the coast of Oman
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- UKMTO reports another tanker struck near Oman
- Tanker struck by unknown projectile 6 nautical miles east of Oman, UKMTO says]]>

item.title: India raises US vessel attacks with Rubio after sailors killed
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- India FM calls Rubio over Gulf ship attacks
- India FM calls Rubio over Gulf ship attacks
- India Foreign Minister calls Rubio over Gulf ship attacks]]>

item.title: Trump halts US military’s plan to forcibly seize Iran’s uranium: Report
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- US ground mission to capture Iran's uranium paused by Trump - report]]>

item.title: Iran says signing of memorandum of understanding with US ‘will not be tomorrow’
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Pakistan says US-Iran agreement to be signed tomorrow
- Urgent: Pakistan says U.S.-Iran deal to be signed on Sunday, Iran denies: report]]>

item.title: Russian Missile Stockpile Overwhelms Ukrainian Air Defenses
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Russia Is Rich in Ballistic Missiles. Ukraine Is Short of Ways to Stop Them.
- Russia Is Rich in Ballistic Missiles. Ukraine Is Short of Ways to Stop Them.]]>

item.title: Ebola Comes for Congo’s Most Vulnerable Children
item.source: The New York Times (+1 other sources)

Matched Titles:
- Ebola spreading into new areas in DR Congo: WHO]]>

item.title: Why Ebola came back — and a warning for the next pandemic
item.description:

- What to Know About the Ebola Outbreak
- The Ebola outbreak: is it spinning out of control?
- The Ebola outbreak: is it spinning out of control?]]>
